reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: Poor quality silicone that easily tears
reviews.text: I didn't know that silicone could actually tear like this stuff has when I removed them from my AirPods. I'm past the return window and these literally ripped after about a month and a half of use when I was trying to slide them off the AirPods. Look elsewhere!

reviews.title: These are crap ear buds don't get them.
reviews.text: These are not loud at all. I can barely hear what I'm playing through them in bed, at the gym it's impossible to make anything out. You'd figure that spending this much on ear buds would mean they'd be good, high quality ear buds, but that simply is not the case.

reviews.title: but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers
reviews.text:
Time has passed since I returned them, so I don't remember exactly all the details, but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers, my main left and right speakers in my home theater are Klipsch. Excellent. But these in-ear headphones sounded bad. No low end, mid-rangy. Only manually pushing them I could get a better sound, but always too much towards the mids and mid-high frequencies.
I had higher expectations with them, knowing the brand. I thought they could be headphones I would like and trust to listen to music, and also being able to do exercises. I'm not 100% sure now, but I think I remember I couldn't keep them on while running and sweating.

reviews.title: Great Sound With Comfort And Stability
reviews.text:
This is an excellent set of Sports headphones that sounds great and stays put when you're getting your workout in. The headphones use a dual magnet, dynamic moving coil micro speaker to deliver a frequency response of 10HZ to 19kHz making them more than adequate for listening outside of the gym as well. While these headphones work with any device they are truly made for the Apple line of products (iPhone, iPad, iPod) as the control box gives you control over the volume, skip tracks and even take calls.

►► SOUND QUALITY ◄◄

The sound across the board is excellent from the low-end through the mid-range and high-end. They are not as open and airy as my Ultimate Ears TripleFi 10's, a set that listed for $399 retail, but they don't feel muted at all when listening to them.

Testing through a variety of music genres it would seem that these are tuned for the louder, upbeat music that you'd listen to while working out which makes sense since these are Sports headphones. With that said if I would have no problem listening to acoustic music through these as they product a nicely balanced, clean sound that is better than a lot of wired headsets I've tried. They are way better than the headphones included with my iPhone.

►► COMFORT ◄◄

For me comfort is just as important as sound quality because if your in-ear monitors aren't comfortable you won't want to wear them for extended periods of time. This set does a couple things right in the comfort arena with the design of the oval earbuds and the over the ear wire design that keeps the headphones in place and makes them feel as close to weightless as you can get.

I was a bit skeptical of the oval design of the earbuds as I am very used to the circular design and have been very happy with the Comply tips that I normally use. With that said the oval design here truly does seem to make a difference in the comfort of these tips as the included tips are more comfortable than most, if not all, of the standard tips I've had included in a set of headphones.

►► CONTROLS ◄◄

There is a small control box attached to the clip that you can use to keep the cord in place. The control box is very similar to those on other sets of headphones I have tested and it worked pretty much as expected except for the way you move up and down in the track list.

The top button on the control box is used to raise the volume on your device.

The bottom button on the control box is used to lower the volume on your device.

The center button is the most versatile as a quick click will play or pause your music or answer a call if the phone is ringing. A double tap of the center button will move to the next track in your track listing and a triple tap of the center button will move to the previous track. Pressing and holding the center button for a second will initiate Siri. While I am used to the volume buttons normally doubling up as the previous / next track control once I was used to this system it was a breeze to use.

►► PHONE CALLS ◄◄

The headset does a nice job with calls due to the fact that the microphone is nice and clear so there is no worries about taking a call while wearing these headphones.

►► CONCLUSION ◄◄

Overall this is an excellent set of Sports headphones that are both comfortable and sound great. They stay firmly in place and seem to be built to handle whatever wear and tear you will throw at them while working out. I love having full control over my iPhone with the included control. For me this is about as close to perfect as you can come with a Sports set of headphones. Highly recommended.

Sample provided for review.

reviews.title: Just right for me.
reviews.text: Diggin' these just fine. I can see how maybe people with tiny ears, or oddly shaped ears, might not have the right fit. Also, the portion in-ear is quite tiny, so there's not a huge amount of bass, but I still like the clarity, and there's enough adjustability to tailor the sound, even on my tiny Sandisc Mp3 player. What I like the most though, is the over the ear design, and I can have the wires feed out back out of my way. The portion in-ear, with the smallish oval tips, also makes me quite happy. So small, and un-noticeable, and comfortable, and they stay put till the end of my hike, or run, or skate, or whatever. The ones that came with the player sounded good too, but really annoying and would fall out when you get sweaty or turn your head. And I just didn't have a bunch of the new-style design to try out, with the horn on them that you rotate and lock into the ear. I read that those kind still fall out when sweaty and slippery anyway. (or you don't get the right fit). All problems solved with these sporty little guys. And Klipsch speakers and equipment have always impressed, so I'm glad I trusted my instincts...

reviews.text: I wanted to replace my old clunker of a boom box.  I needed a small CD player with_ a speaker so I wouldn't have to wear ear buds.  That's what I found here. At first, I wondered about the sound, but considering how small it is, the sound is fine.  I'm glad to have easier access to my CD collection.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth CD player
reviews.text:
I have a few CDs that I have kept despite mostly using streaming services. Music not available online. This device allows me to hear them again.
Connected very easy to my Bluetooth tailgate speaker.

Don't plan on using the built in speaker as I have several better speakers that I can connect to with cable or Bluetooth.

reviews.title: Sound Quality not the best on its own speakers
reviews.text:
I found using the Aux cable along with my Bluetooth headphones the sound quality is much better.
The headphones that came with unit wasn't that good.

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good
reviews.text:
My 13 yo son is on the vintage wave, so he has been using this and the cassette one. He is happy!
Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

title: 2 Pack iPhone Earbuds [Apple MFi Certified] Wired in-Ear Stereo Noise Canceling Isolating Lightning Headphones with Built-in Microphone&Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 13 12 SE 11 X 8 7-All iOS
description:
Using the Step
1.Quick and Easy Connection scheme one:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.Connection scheme two: a.The first time you use it, you need to enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(The headset will automatically connect to your device the next time, so you don’t need to do this step again.) Need Attention: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use. And it must always be connected to Bluetooth during use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets".
features: 【Widely Compatibility】: Compatible with all lightning connector devices.Headphone are widely compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/14 Pro Max/14 Mini/13/13 Pro/13 Pro Max/13 Mini/12 Mini/12 Pro Max/SE/11 Pro Max/11 Pro/XS Max/X/XR/8/8 Plus/7 Plus/7 Support All iOS Systems.Plug and Play!!!

【Apple MFi certified】: MFi-certified lightning headset, integrated improved C1 chip. Our wired headset offers you the most realistic sound quality with 2 holes that radiate 360° stereo, so you can better immerse yourself in world music during exercise and training environment.

【Mic & Volume Control 】: The headphone for iPhone built-in controller with a high-quality hands-free microphone. Music and Volume controller is designed to play/pause music, volume up/down, next & previous track, answer/end calls Wake up Siri. No need to take out the phone from your bags or pocket when performing these operations,emancipating your hands.

【Easy connection,two ways】:1.The first:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.The second: a.The first time you use it,enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(It will automatically connect to your device next time) Note: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use.

【Comfortable Wearing Experience】: The earphones for iPhone with ergonomic angular design and soft & premium ear tips, allow you to listen to the music for a long time without pain perception and keep a long sense of comfort during the wear. If you are not satisfied with this wired Bluetooth earphones, please feel free to contact us.Our service team will reply you with satisfied solution within 12 hours.
